pushback_verification: All 9 findings verified against current state. No artifacts modified between external review (2026-05-20T04:43Z) and this address-reviews invocation. 0 stale suppressions.

resolutions.external_finding_title: Tier-1 string recommendations do not define required command/args
resolutions.action: Applied user decision: best-effort parse. Tier 1 surfaces verbatim string in `reason`; parses for leading `/opsx:<verb> [args]` token to populate `command`/`args` when possible, leaves them null otherwise. Also added marker-override clause per W3's resolution.
ripple_flagged: design.md (Decisions: 3-tier recommendation section may want a parenthetical mentioning the parse-and-null-fallback)

resolutions.external_finding_title: Phase precedence contradicts the mid-apply scenario
resolutions.action: Applied user decision: freshness condition on rule 2. Rule 2 wins only if the latest .orbit-runs JSON's timestamp is newer than tasks.md mtime; otherwise falls through to rule 3 (partial tasks → applying).
ripple_flagged: design.md (Decisions: Phase inference section should reflect the freshness condition)

resolutions.external_finding_title: Tier-2 review-marker rule is unreachable under the tier definition
resolutions.action: Applied user decision: marker override in tier 1 + delete tier-2 rule 5. Tier 1 now overrides the JSON's recommendation when unresolved @review: markers exist. Tier-2 rule list shrinks from 5 to 4 rules; a parenthetical explains why rule 5 was removed.
ripple_flagged: design.md (Decisions: 3-tier hierarchy section needs to note the marker override)

resolutions.external_finding_title: recent[] ordering depends on undefined archived_at data
resolutions.action: Added new 'archived_at field on archived ChangeRecords' requirement to orbit-status-output spec with 3 scenarios. Source priority: archive-*.json timestamp > dated directory name (interpreted as UTC midnight) > directory mtime.
ripple_flagged: design.md (ChangeRecord field list should mention archived_at)
tasks.md (group 4 enumeration tasks may benefit from a sub-task explicitly computing archived_at per the priority order)

resolutions.external_finding_title: Equal last_touched tie-break is still unspecified
resolutions.action: Added tie-break clause to multi-change ranking requirement: 'on equal last_touched mtimes, ties are broken by lexicographic order of change name (ascending).'

resolutions.external_finding_title: next_unchecked extraction needs a parse rule
resolutions.action: Added new 'next_unchecked extraction rule' requirement to orbit-status-output spec with regex `^- \[ \] [0-9]+\.[0-9]+ (.+)$`, 2 scenarios (first-matching wins, malformed lines skipped), and null when no matches.
ripple_flagged: tasks.md (task 5.2 already covers next_unchecked extraction; the new spec scenario makes it testable)

resolutions.external_finding_title: Malformed JSON handling is specified but not represented in implementation tasks
resolutions.action: Added task 6.6 to group 6 (JSON ingestion) covering parse-failure handling: log warning to stderr, treat data as absent, continue run.

resolutions.external_finding_title: Large task list could use apply chunk boundaries
resolutions.action: Added preamble to tasks.md before group 1 naming 5 implementation chunks (scaffold+detection, inventory+parsing, phase+attention+recommendation engine, output+degradation, integration+docs+validation) with group-range mappings.

resolutions.external_finding_title: Design open questions should be explicitly accepted or resolved
resolutions.action: Added 'Disposition' annotation to each of the 3 design open questions, marking them as 'deferred to apply-time' with documented defaults: stale_review mtime → no buffer; jq → hard dependency, README install guidance; --all flag → no flag in v1, use --limit <large-N> instead.

ripple_flagged_files_aggregate: design.md — touched conceptually by W1, W2, W3, W4 resolutions; Decisions section may benefit from a refresh to reflect (a) tier-1 best-effort parse + marker override, (b) phase rule 2 freshness condition, (c) ChangeRecord.archived_at field. Out of scope for this address-reviews; consider a brief design.md update before /opsx:apply.

tasks.md — task 4.4 should explicitly compute archived_at per priority order; tasks 9.x (recommendation engine) should call out the best-effort parse for tier 1; tasks 10.x (multi-change ranking) should reflect the tie-break.

requirement_count_change.delta: +2 (archived_at field + next_unchecked extraction rule, both in orbit-status-output)

tier2_rule_count_change.delta: -1 (rule 5 removed; marker handling moved to tier 1)

final_assessment: 0 unresolved findings remaining from external review. 0 escalated. All 9 walked and resolved (3 decision-applied, 6 trivial fixes). openspec validate passes. Cross-AI review cycle complete for iter-1.
next_recommended: Recommend re-running /opsx:review bootstrap-orbit-status-cli to confirm convergence on the refreshed artifacts. Several findings touched cross-requirement coherence (W1, W2, W3) which a fresh internal pass should validate. Alternatively, proceed to /opsx:apply bootstrap-orbit-status-cli if you're comfortable that the resolutions stand without another review pass.
